title: zanthoxylum valens
intro: Zanthoxylum valens, also known as the Mexican prickly ash or Mexican prickly-ash, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum valens include relief from pain and inflammation, improved digestion, and enhanced immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
